name: Pork Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the pork ribs in a large Dutch oven or kettle with enough boiling water to cover them completely.
2. Add 1 teaspoon of salt, lemon slices, and onion slices to the pot.
3. Cook for 45-60 minutes until the water has cooled down slightly.
4. Drain the ribs thoroughly, discarding the lemon and onion slices.
5. Brush the drained ribs with barbecue sauce and place them over slow coals.
6. Turn the ribs every 10 minutes, brushing frequently with additional barbecue sauce.
7. Continue cooking for 35-45 minutes or until the ribs are tender and well coated with sauce.
8. Serve with extra barbecue sauce on top.
